default.description: Default threshold: 10% increase triggers regression warning

bill_payments.description: Bill payments may have higher CPU variance due to iteration

family_wallet.description: Slightly higher CPU threshold for multisig operations

get_total_unpaid.description: Higher CPU threshold for aggregation operations

archive_paid_bills.description: Archive scans bill storage and writes archive records

restore_bill.description: Single-record restore with owner authorization checks

bulk_cleanup_bills.description: Cleanup iterates archived records and removes matched entries

batch_pay_bills.description: Mixed batch processing with per-item validation and partial success

get_all_goals.description: Slightly higher thresholds for bulk retrieval

get_remittance_schedules.description: Higher thresholds for schedule queries due to iteration

get_remittance_schedule.description: Lower thresholds for single schedule lookup

get_remittance_summary.description: Standard thresholds for two-call split aggregation

get_trend_analysis_multi.description: Higher thresholds: pure in-contract iteration over user-supplied history Vec

get_financial_health_report.description: Higher thresholds: nine cross-contract calls with per-item iteration loops

archive_old_reports.description: Higher thresholds: dual O(n) map iteration over active and archive storage

get_storage_stats.description: Tight thresholds: O(1) single instance-storage key read
